description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker image with a docker:dind service and defines a single deploy stage. Add a before_script that runs `apk add --update py-pip` then `pip install docker-compose`. Define a deploy job (tagged docker) that runs only on the master branch, uses the variables DOCKER_CERT_PATH, DOCKER_HOST and DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY, creates the $DOCKER_CERT_PATH directory, writes the $CA, $CLIENT_CERT and $CLIENT_KEY secrets to ca.pem, cert.pem and key.pem, executes `docker-compose build` and `docker-compose up -d --force-recreate`, and finally removes the $DOCKER_CERT_PATH directory. No caches or artifacts are defined.
